mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deliveryList ( uuid, delivery, vendorCode, consignee, deliveryTime, deliveryNumber, creator, creatorId, remark, status, makeOverCount, shjg, backDeliveryNumber, arrivalNo ) SELECT uuid, delivery, vendorCode, consignee, deliveryTime, deliveryNumber, creator, creatorId, remark, status, makeOverCount, shjg, backDeliveryNumber, arrivalNo FROM ABLTEST..deliveryList A WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deliveryList B WHERE A.uuid = B.uuid) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deliveryList B WHERE A.deliveryNumber = B.deliveryNumber)

INSERT INTO deliveryNoteDetails ( uuid, parentId, purchaseOrder, deliveryNum, packDetails ) SELECT uuid, parentId, purchaseOrder, deliveryNum, packDetails FROM ABLTEST..deliveryNoteDetails A WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deliveryNoteDetails B WHERE A.uuid = B.uuid)

INSERT INTO bm_barcode_detail ( id, org_no, barcode, item_no, unit_no, unit_name, supplier_no, lot_date, customer_no, owner_no, bar_type, supplier_product_date, supplier_product_lot, lot_desc, barcode_vld_date, gen_moment, source_no, source_seq, barcode_weight, reference_qty, reference_unit_no, customer_barcode, supplier_barcode, qty, sn_warehouse_no, sn_cell_no, sn_barcode_status, combination_lot_no, wms_lot_no, lot_att01, lot_att02, lot_att03, lot_att04, lot_att05, lot_att06, lot_att07, lot_att08, lot_att09, lot_att10, lot_att11, lot_att12, lot_att13, lot_att14, lot_att15, lot_att16, lot_att17, lot_att18, lot_att19, lot_att20, lot_att21, lot_att22, lot_att23, lot_att24, lot_att25, lot_att26, lot_att27, lot_att28, lot_att29, lot_att30, lot_att31, lot_att32, lot_att33, lot_att34, lot_att35, lot_att36, lot_att37, lot_att38, lot_att39, lot_att40, lot_att41, lot_att42, lot_att43, lot_att44, lot_att45, lot_att46, lot_att47, lot_att48, lot_att49, lot_att50, status_code, remark, create_flag, create_by, create_name, create_date, update_by, update_name, update_date, standard_col01, standard_col02, standard_col03, standard_col04, standard_col05, standard_col06, standard_col07, standard_col08, standard_col09, standard_col10, standard_col11, standard_col12, standard_col13, standard_col14, standard_col15, guest_col01, guest_col02, guest_col03, guest_col04, guest_col05, guest_col06, guest_col07, guest_col08, guest_col09, guest_col10, org_name, org_short_name, item_name, item_spec, supplier_name, supplier_short_name, customer_name, customer_short_name, reference_unit_name, sn_warehouse_name, sn_cell_name, tenantsid, print_split_flag ) SELECT id, org_no, barcode, item_no, unit_no, unit_name, supplier_no, lot_date, customer_no, owner_no, bar_type, supplier_product_date, supplier_product_lot, lot_desc, barcode_vld_date, gen_moment, source_no, source_seq, barcode_weight, reference_qty, reference_unit_no, customer_barcode, supplier_barcode, qty, sn_warehouse_no, sn_cell_no, sn_barcode_status, combination_lot_no, wms_lot_no, lot_att01, lot_att02, lot_att03, lot_att04, lot_att05, lot_att06, lot_att07, lot_att08, lot_att09, lot_att10, lot_att11, lot_att12, lot_att13, lot_att14, lot_att15, lot_att16, lot_att17, lot_att18, lot_att19, lot_att20, lot_att21, lot_att22, lot_att23, lot_att24, lot_att25, lot_att26, lot_att27, lot_att28, lot_att29, lot_att30, lot_att31, lot_att32, lot_att33, lot_att34, lot_att35, lot_att36, lot_att37, lot_att38, lot_att39, lot_att40, lot_att41, lot_att42, lot_att43, lot_att44, lot_att45, lot_att46, lot_att47, lot_att48, lot_att49, lot_att50, status_code, remark, create_flag, create_by, create_name, create_date, update_by, update_name, update_date, standard_col01, standard_col02, standard_col03, standard_col04, standard_col05, standard_col06, standard_col07, standard_col08, standard_col09, standard_col10, standard_col11, standard_col12, standard_col13, standard_col14, standard_col15, guest_col01, guest_col02, guest_col03, guest_col04, guest_col05, guest_col06, guest_col07, guest_col08, guest_col09, guest_col10, org_name, org_short_name, item_name, item_spec, supplier_name, supplier_short_name, customer_name, customer_short_name, reference_unit_name, sn_warehouse_name, sn_cell_name, tenantsid, print_split_flag FROM ABLTEST..bm_barcode_detail A WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bm_barcode_detail B WHERE A.id = B.id) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bm_barcode_detail B WHERE A.barcode = B.barcode)
